case_title: TRISTAN TRANSLATIONS VS RONDEAU BAY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $393.51 FILED BY TRISTAN TRANSLATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT RONDEAU BAY CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO RODEAU BAY CONST. RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRISTAN TRANSLATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RONDEAU BAY CONSTRUCTION, INC. $393.51 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $406.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RONDEAU BAY CONSTRUCTION, INC.
